 Hi Valued Customer,
 


 As a current Zoom user, you're already familiar with the benefits of our platform. However, did you know you can enhance your experience even further with Zoom Workplace Pro?
 


 With Zoom Workplace Pro, you'll enjoy enhanced features and benefits that will take your meetings and collaboration to the next level. These benefits include increased video quality, expanded storage, unlimited meetings, AI technology, like composing messages, meeting summaries, and more.
 


 Upgrade your Zoom experience today and save an additional 15% off your first year when choosing an annual plan. 

 

https://click.e.zoom.us/?%3D 
Upgrade today

Disclaimer

This offer is only available to new customers purchasing a Pro Annual Online. This offer is not available to customers with pre-existing discounts. Maximum of 9 Licenses per Purchase. This coupon has no cash value and can only be used for up to 9 Pro Annual Licenses. This offer is valid for 15 days from the day this email arrives in your inbox and will be effective for 1 annual billing cycle. This cannot be combined, exchanged, or used in conjunction with any other offer. Please note that Federal, State, and Local governments are not eligible for this promotion. These fees are exclusive of taxes.
